description_long: This is a grand stone cathedral modeled after the iconic Notre-Dame de Paris, featuring two massive square bell towers at the front and a tall, slender spire rising from the center of the roof. The structure is adorned with flying buttresses along the sides, supporting the high vaulted walls and large stained glass rose windows. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in dark slate, contrasting with the pale stone facade. The main entrance is richly decorated with pointed arches, sculpted portals, and intricate tracery, while the rear of the building showcases a semi-circular apse with radiating chapels and elaborate window designs. Ornamental pinnacles, statues, and detailed stonework embellish the exterior, reflecting the Gothic architectural style. The cathedral sits on a rectangular base, suggesting its placement within an urban environment.
description: A monumental Gothic cathedral with twin bell towers, a central spire, flying buttresses, and ornate stonework, inspired by Notre-Dame de Paris. Features include large stained glass windows, pointed arches, and a richly decorated facade.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cathedral's side elevation, showcasing the flying buttresses, rose window, and the full length of the nave with the two bell towers and central spire visible.
description_view_1: The rear view emphasizes the rounded apse, radiating chapels, and the intricate pattern of the flying buttresses, with the spire and both bell towers in the background.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the opposite elevation, displaying the buttresses, rose window, and the length of the nave, with one bell tower more prominently visible.
description_view_3: The frontal view centers on the twin bell towers, the main entry portals with pointed arches, and the large rose window above the entrance.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade is richly decorated with pointed arches, sculpted portals, rose windows, and numerous statues and reliefs. Ornamental tracery and columns further embellish the entryway and towers.
attribute_stained_glass_windows: Large stained glass rose windows are present on the front and sides, featuring intricate patterns and vibrant colors, especially visible above the main entrance and in the apse.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal features three pointed arches, each richly adorned with sculpted figures, reliefs, and decorative columns. Large wooden doors and intricate stone tracery complete the grand entrance.
